name: GOLFTEC Las Colinas
address: 901 MacArthur Park Dr Suite 130, Irving, TX 75063
about: GOLFTEC is a golf instruction and club fitting center that utilizes advanced technology, including OPTIMOTION motion capture and launch monitors, to provide data-driven coaching and practice sessions. The company offers personalized golf lessons for players of all skill levels, from beginners to experienced golfers, with a focus on improving swing mechanics and game strategy. Services include club fittings that claim to add 21 more yards on average, alongside practice memberships and access to simulator technology for accelerated improvement.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven lessons using advanced swing analysis technology
Personalized improvement plans tailored to individual goals
Custom club fitting with launch monitors to optimize equipment

simulator_hardware.notes: Used with OPTIMOTION technology and launch monitors for swing analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but GOLFTEC also provides club rentals and offers club fitting services to match you with the perfect equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink services, so it appears that outside food and drinks are not permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Simulator time for 18 holes is not specified, but sessions are typically based on lesson duration or practice time.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: While not explicitly stated, GOLFTEC offers lessons for all ages, including junior programs, making it suitable for youth golfers.
